_comment: Rich per-MOMENT footage manifest for THE ROAD AHEAD. Each entry in `moments` pulls ONE cinematic moment from a SOURCE (a YouTube-Unlisted link/id OR a dropped-in file in ./video/) into a scene SLOT, with cinematic edits. A single long source can appear MANY times for different scenes — start/end pick each segment. Keys starting with _ are ignored. Edit this data file (no code change) and redeploy; THE ROAD AHEAD renders the right moment automatically. See video/README.md for slot ids and docs/road-ahead.md for the full field reference.

_fields.source: YouTube watch/share/embed/shorts URL or bare 11-char id, OR a filename dropped into ./video/ (e.g. 'morning-drive-nashville.mp4').
_fields.slot: REQUIRED. Which scene slot this moment fills (e.g. 'dark-highway', 'sunrise', 'truck-driving-away').
_fields.start: Segment start — seconds (14) or m:ss ('0:14'). Optional.
_fields.end: Segment end — seconds or m:ss. Optional.
_fields.zoom: Extra fill scale >=1 to reframe/crop in. Optional.
_fields.grade: Color-grade preset: none | night | dawn | noir | warm | steel | cool.
_fields.fadeIn: Fade-in seconds when the moment enters. Optional.
_fields.poster: Poster still filename in ./poster/ shown before play / under Save-Data. Optional.
_fields.duck: Duck the ambience beds while this moment plays (true/false).
_fields.mobile: Object of per-field overrides applied on small screens (mobile-first tuning).
